prestazioni: Engine: F4Rt 2.0L turbocharged inline-4 (engine code F4R 874) with a forged internals build including Manley H-beam connecting rods, JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 400+ HP reliably. Turbo upgrade to a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II with a custom 0.63 A/R turbine housing and billet compressor wheel for optimized spool and top-end flow, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe and GReddy Revolution RS 70mm cat-back exhaust system.

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with custom valving for the Megane RS Cup-S chassis, featuring 24-way adjustable compression and rebound damping, adjustable camber plates, and helper springs for track use. Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part numbers SPF0115K, SPF0116K, SPF0117K) replace all OEM subframe and control arm bushings to eliminate compliance. Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) and front sway bar (27mm) with spherical end links for precise roll control.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD in the front differential (part QDF7Z) and a Wavetrac limited-slip differential in the rear (part WVT-F4R) for balanced power delivery. Upgraded clutch system with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (part 3000 952 001) and lightweight flywheel (7.5kg) for rapid engagement. Custom 3.9:1 final drive ratio paired with a reinforced gearbox using a PPG close-ratio gear set (1st: 2.62, 2nd: 1.88, 3rd: 1.46, 4th: 1.19, 5th: 1.00, 6th: 0.84) for optimized acceleration.
estetica: Aero: Custom carbon fiber widebody kit from Liberty Walk (LB-MEGANE-RS-CUP-S) with extended front fenders, aggressive side skirts, and a rear diffuser integrated into the bumper. Front splitter from Seibon Carbon with adjustable canards and a 3D-printed ABS rear wing (custom airfoil profile, 1200mm span, 200mm chord) mounted on CNC-machined aluminum pedestals for 150kg+ of downforce at 160km/h.

Exterior: Full respray in Renault Sport's 'Iron Blue' (code 494) with a matte clear coat and custom vinyl overlays (3M 1080 series) in 'Gloss Black' for the roof, mirrors, and rear diffuser accents. OEM Cup-S wheels refinished in gold with a 10mm spacer (H&R 546 501 00) and wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35 R19 front, 265/30 R19 rear). Custom LED taillights with sequential turn signals (VLand VLAND-RS-001) and a carbon fiber hood with a functional heat extractor (Seibon CF-HD-031).

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Status Racing, including Recaro Pole Position seats (part 391.20.01) with custom embroidery (Renault Sport logo in red stitching). Custom roll cage from Custom Cages (8-point bolt-in, T45 steel, powder-coated 'Gunmetal Gray') with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (320mm, suede) with a quick-release hub and a digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (1.3" display) integrated with a Bosch LSU 4.9 wideband sensor and accelerometer for real-time telemetry.
